title: Abyss of Destruction
description: A mod that adds some dark secrets, and ways to exploit them
body:
A mod that adds some things you wish you never saw,
And the ways to use them.

This is a note to server owners!
This mod was created to use the Abyssal cretures for a custom SMP. Go ahead and use creative mode to check it out!

This mod adds a new crafting tree (compound)
This tree can be used to create items such as flintlock rifles, armour, swords, and more!
As well as adding the abyss, A dimention with nothing much to it
And finnally, the abyssal crawler, a playable monster!

- 15+ new items for survial
- 8+ new items for a custom class
- A new dimention
- A few advancements
- And a few new blocks (for crafting)

This mod is great for any survial game if you want another tier of items, without losing that base minecraft feeling. Or if you want some extra fun stuff, you can enable the abyssal gear to make a more dynamic world.

Enjoy!
-RasberryPi
